hero.title_line1: From the port to your customer's door,
hero.subtitle: Aventra runs your sea, air, and land shipments with live tracking and warehouses on one platform.

tracking.title: Where's your shipment right now?
tracking.not_found: No shipment found with this number. Double-check the waybill number and try again.

footer.tagline: Your logistics partner from pickup to final delivery, on one unified tracking and warehousing platform.
